meta.screenerTitle: Check Your Health Insurance Eligibility | CoveredUSA
meta.screenerDescription: Answer a few questions to see what free or low-cost health insurance you may qualify for.

hero.headline: Do you qualify for free health insurance?
hero.subheadline: Check in 2 minutes. Free, confidential, available in Spanish.

screener.title: Health Insurance Eligibility Check
screener.subtitle: Answer a few questions to see what you may qualify for

footer.disclaimer: CoveredUSA is not affiliated with or endorsed by any government agency. We do not offer every plan available in your area. We connect you with licensed insurance agents who can help you explore your options. You can always visit HealthCare.gov, Medicare.gov, or contact 1-800-MEDICARE for help with plan choices.
footer.medicare: Not connected with or endorsed by the United States government or the federal Medicare program. For a complete list of available plans, contact 1-800-MEDICARE (TTY users call 1-877-486-2048) 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
